summary: Iteration 34: Frontend-only testing for new Module Map tab feature. All tests passed. Verified Module Map tab visibility, navigation, registry data loading, search/filter controls, module node selection, and detail pane updates. No tab navigation regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: DocsModuleMapPanel.jsx: Well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Module Map correctly loads 186 modules from registry API with proper grouping by root (aimmh_lib, backend, frontend)
Search filter correctly filters modules by path (e.g., 'server' search returns 2 modules)
Root filter dropdown works correctly (backend: 53 modules, frontend: 130 modules)
Module node selection properly updates detail pane with path, code lines, commented lines, and functions
Refresh button triggers registry reload correctly
AimmhHubPage.jsx: TABS array correctly includes 'module-map' tab with label 'Module Map'
AimmhHubTabContent.jsx: Properly handles 'module-map' case returning DocsModuleMapPanel component

test_credentials.note: Guest flow used - no authentication required for Module Map testing

seed_data_creation: None - Module Map uses existing registry data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Module Map tab is fully operational. Registry loads 186 modules grouped by root (aimmh_lib, backend, frontend). Search and root filter controls work correctly. Module node selection updates detail pane with path, code lines, commented lines, module doc, and functions. All other tabs (Help, Visualizer, Registry, Instances, Batch Runs, Roleplay Runs, Chat, Synthesis) remain navigable with no regressions.

module_map_tab_visibility.details: Module Map tab visible in navigation bar between Help and Visualizer tabs

module_map_panel_loading.details: DocsModuleMapPanel loads with registry data showing 186 total modules

module_map_stats_display.details: Stats grid shows Modules: 186, Filtered: 186, Violations: 0

module_map_search_filter.details: Search input filters modules by path - 'server' search returns 2 modules

module_map_root_filter.details: Root dropdown filters by root - backend: 53 modules, frontend: 130 modules, aimmh_lib: 3 modules

module_map_node_selection.details: Clicking module nodes updates detail pane with path, code lines, commented lines, module doc, and functions

module_map_graphical_representation.details: Modules displayed as clickable nodes with progress bars indicating relative code size

tab_navigation_no_regression.details: All tabs navigable: Help, Module Map, Visualizer, Registry, Instances, Batch Runs, Roleplay Runs, Chat, Synthesis

ui_design_review.contrast: Good - emerald accent on dark zinc background provides sufficient contrast
ui_design_review.spacing: Good - consistent padding and margins throughout Module Map panel
ui_design_review.layout: Good - two-column layout with graph zone and detail zone works well on desktop
ui_design_review.responsiveness: Good - grid layout adapts with lg:grid-cols breakpoint

console_observations.note: Minor 404 errors observed when navigating to Chat tab (likely related to guest user chat prompts loading), but not related to Module Map feature

mocked_apis.details: No mocked APIs - Module Map uses real /api/v1/hub/readme-registry endpoint
